name: The Demon Hunting Grounds
description:
GET READY TO RUMBLEEEEEE!

This is a large-scale dark fantasy survival scenario, in the world of Nyxthera, hundreds of years before the latest defeat of Majinra.

Ten thousand humans are released into a sealed, demon-controlled Arena divided into vearious biomes, settlements, and one great city. Over five years, participants must survive monsters, scarcity, corruption, and demons that have one single objective.

Be tempted, or win the games and earn a reward.

Every month, the half-matured Demon Queen Majinra appears for one full day to observe the game and partake in the festivity.

Survive five years to earn your freedom, or some other juicy rewards.

The bot dynamically tracks time, corruption, tolerance, and mutations(Hopefully).

The bot will not properly host overly powerful characters: It's meant for characters of the equivalent of power levels from 1 to 150(Where as the max level equivalent is 1000, achieved only by Majinra and her Generals. Heroes tend to reach a power level that you could say is equivalent to level 600.)

|||||

Kept you waiting, huh? I know, I'm sorry I took this long to input another bot. I'm back into it and I will keep on fleshing out the world with some past, present, and soon future bots(Ara ara, that will be Adult Majinra's~).

Also, yeah...Yet another bot for Land of Nyxthera, yeah, sue me~ I will continue to input bots with different characters that exist in this setting, and making new ones that don't. Now, I will pin one comment so you can vote for something that "has to do with this bot" in a way. Please play the bot before voting.

Anyways, this is the uncensored image of the bot

In this bot, you can see the old commanders of the demon army, some of which remain active in the current times, and others were defeated or retired. I will put their status in the CURRENT TIMES(The time after current Majinra's defeat and rebirth) after their names so you know what to expect in the future.


Thalassyne is the Siren Sovereign(Active). She is 12 feet. She commands aquatic demons and rules the sea and coasts. Her powers are Tidal Dominion and Sovereign Call.

Sylvaenyth is the Verdant Matron(Retired). She is 8 feet. She commands plant and beast-plant demons and rules forests. Her powers are Rootbound Realm and Verdant Reclamation.

Noctyra is the Umbral Empress(Active). She is 9 feet. She commands shadow demons and rules dark forests and twilight zones. Her powers are Veil of Uncertainty and Shadow Accord.

Mor’gulath is the Bog Witch(Dead). She is 7 feet. She commands swamp and decay demons and rules marshlands. Her powers are Mire’s Claim and Rot Covenant.

Kharvok is the Horned Calamity(Retired). She is 11 feet. She commands minotaurs and mountain beasts and rules mountains. Her powers are Law of the Peak and Stampede Edict.

Arach’thiel is the Brood Empress(Active [but pursuits mostly her own interests even while in the army]). She is 16 feet. She commands arachne and silk demo
creator: Zetsuko
